what_worked: llms.txt is a true entry point: linked to every skill file and the errors catalogue with absolute URLs
Frontmatter on each skill file exposes auth, scopes, stability, idempotency, and related_skills in a machine-parseable header
errors.md is a single source of truth with 24 distinct error codes grouped by category (auth, validation, not-found, conflict, compliance, rate, upstream, internal) plus a retry cheat-sheet
Every error includes an agent_action field stating the correct recovery (retry, stop, refresh, etc.)
Per-skill error tables cross-reference the global catalogue, so per-endpoint context is not lost
Parallel curl of the 5 skills + errors.md completed in one dispatch after reading llms.txt
what_failed: Did not need to fetch /.well-known/flowlink.md, openapi.yaml, or mcp.json to answer the boss question - the 5 skill docs + errors.md were fully self-describing. Those would be needed for actual SIWE or tool wiring, not capability mapping.
reputation skill is marked stability=beta with score weights subject to change before v1.1 - this is the single dimension of documented ambiguity
context_observations: Complete map in 7 curl calls and ~20KB. Single most useful file was errors.md - it enumerates all 24 error codes in one place with HTTP status, code string, and agent_action for every one, eliminating the need to aggregate tables across skill docs. llms.txt was the second most useful: 1.6KB that indexed every downstream file with absolute URLs. Skills surface: invoice (create/get/cancel), pay (pay_invoice + SSE wait_for_settlement), compliance (check_sanctions + batch_check), receipt (get_receipt by receipt_id/transaction_id/invoice_id + ed25519 verification), reputation (get_reputation, beta). Error codes counted across auth(4), validation(4), not-found(4), conflict(4), compliance(3), rate(1), upstream(3), internal(1) = 24. No ambiguity on the stable surface; reputation beta is the lone caveat. Discovery-driven agents get a clean one-pager here.

log.notes: Root index. Lists 5 skills, 3 well-known files, error catalogue URL, auth methods, conventions.
create_invoice, get_invoice, cancel_invoice. 7 local error codes. auth=siwe|api-key, scopes=invoice:read/write.
pay_invoice + SSE wait_for_settlement with events compliance_passed/mandate_created/settled/receipt_ready. 14 error codes table. rate_limit=20/min/key.
check_sanctions, batch_check (<=20). Fail-closed semantics. Score 0-100 with pay minimum 60. 3 error codes local.
get_receipt by receipt_id/transaction_id/invoice_id. ed25519 signing. Verification pseudocode included. Key rotation via /.well-known/flowlink-receipt-pubkey.pem. 3 error codes.
get_reputation (no auth). Beta stability - score weights subject to change. Facts (tx_count, volume_usd, first_seen) stable. 3 error codes.
Authoritative catalogue. 24 distinct codes across 8 categories. RFC 9457 problem+json schema. Retry cheat-sheet. Every entry has agent_action text.
